Type alias SyntheticsNetworkAssertion

SyntheticsNetworkAssertion: SyntheticsNetworkAssertionLatency | SyntheticsNetworkAssertionMultiNetworkHop | SyntheticsNetworkAssertionPacketLossPercentage | SyntheticsNetworkAssertionJitter | UnparsedObject
